examples.title: Algorithm: Array Operations
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ArrayOperations
INPUT: array, size
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 FOR i FROM 0 TO size-1 DO
 array[i] = i * 2
 END FOR
 FOR i FROM 0 TO size-1 DO
 PRINT array[i]
 END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates basic operations on arrays, including initialization and printing.
